data.arabic_text: ((إِنَّ أَفْضَلَ الدُّعَاءِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، وَأَفْضَلَ الذِّكْرِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ)).
data.english_text: (Jabir  Ibn ‘AAabdullah  related that the Messenger of Allah  said: ‘Verily, the best supplication is: (All praise is for Allah.) and indeed, the best form of remembrance is: (None has the right to be worshipped except Allah.))

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Jabir  Ibn ‘AAabdullah  related that the Messenger of Allah  said: ‘Verily, the best supplication is: (Alhamdu lillah) and indeed, the best form of remembrance is: (La ilaha illal-lah.))
